findings.title: Skill name does not follow agent skills naming rules
findings.description: Skill name 'Art' is invalid. Agent skills require lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, with a maximum length of 64 characters.

findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
findings.description: Skill manifest does not include a 'license' field. Specifying a license helps users understand usage terms.
findings.remediation: Add 'license' field to SKILL.md frontmatter (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

findings.title: Python code block sends HTTP POST request
findings.description: Code block in SKILL.md at line 241 contains potentially dangerous Python code.
findings.remediation: Review the code block for security implications.

findings.title: Python code block executes shell commands
findings.description: Code block in SKILL.md at line 278 contains potentially dangerous Python code.
findings.remediation: Review the code block for security implications.
